grant_title: AI For Social Good (AI4SG) Student Innovation Showcase
geographic_restrictions: Open to students from participating universities (primarily California State University system and partner institutions)
project_area: AI-powered solutions addressing pressing community issues aligned with United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (UN SDGs)
demographic_requirements: Open to undergraduate students from all disciplines, with a focus on Management Information Systems and Computer Science students
eligibility_summary: Undergraduate students from participating universities (including San Jose State University, Cal Poly Pomona, CSU San Bernardino, CSU Long Beach, and others) are eligible to participate. The program encourages interdisciplinary collaboration and focuses on developing AI solutions for social good.
